name: swiss-cheese
displayName: Swiss Cheese — Layered Defense for Agentic Coding
description: No single defense layer is perfect — stack enough imperfect ones that the holes never align. Deterministic stdlib-only guards scan the diff pre-LLM (injection, secrets+redaction, policy, slopsquat); a deterministic selector computes an unremovable review-lens floor; independent read-only lens subagents review the redacted diff in parallel; a fail-closed audit log and per-lens memory make it sharper each run. Native skills, config v2, commit + guard hooks.
